style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#546e7a;fontSize=10;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontColor=#263238;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;fontStyle=1;" value="A_SDU"> value="Vertical = the service (Clause 6). Horizontal = the protocol (Clause 7)."> <mxGeometry x="20" y="218" width="920" height="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n16" parent="1" vertex="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10.5;fontColor=#607d8b;fontFamily=DejaVu Sans;" value="The A_SDU never leaves the node; the A_PDU is what the peer receives."> <mxGeometry x="20" y="236" width="920" height="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
svg.text: Where each data unit lives — ISO 14229-1 Clause 4, Figure 1
Vertical = the service (Clause 6). Horizontal = the protocol (Clause 7).
The A_SDU never leaves the node; the A_PDU is what the peer receives.
